name: leakguard
description: Local-first secret redaction engine for LLM chat UIs

scripts.test: node tests/detector.test.js && node tests/ip_transform.test.js && node tests/ip_child_first_audit.test.js && node tests/composer_helpers.test.js && node tests/typed_interception.test.js && node tests/protected_sites.test.js && node tests/productization.test.js && node tests/security.test.js && node tests/synthetic_pack.test.js && node tests/build_targets.test.js
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:chrome-enterprise && npm run build:firefox && npm run build:firefox-enterprise
